title: Matrice de couverture officielle PER 5H–6H — programme 6H

policy.progression: Every listed official 5H–6H progression is in scope and mapped.
policy.explicit6HEndpoints: Only expectations explicitly marked 6e are labelled as 6H endpoints.
policy.cycleEndExpectations: Unbanded expectations remain Cycle 2 end expectations and are directional or diagnostic only.
policy.geographyAndHistory: PER context only; no assumed canton layer and no MER content treated as normative.

domains.label: Mathématiques
domains.contextPolicy: PER Cycle 2 MSN 21–25; MSN 25 is transversal.

domains.label: Sciences
domains.contextPolicy: PER Cycle 2 MSN 25–28; MSN 25 is integrated into the three science objectives.
